TgoSection.title: AI Customer Service Platform
TgoSection.descriptionLine1: Dedicated to helping enterprises build [AI agent teams for customer service]
TgoSection.descriptionLine2: It integrates multi-channel access, agent orchestration, knowledge base management (RAG), human agent collaboration, and more core features.

CoreCapabilities.title: Core Capabilities
CoreCapabilities.description: TGO provides a series of core capabilities to help developers build and manage applications more efficiently.

intelligentOrchestration.title: AI Agent Orchestration
features: Multi-Agent Support - Supports configuring multiple AI agents, with the ability to select different Agents based on business scenarios
Multi-Model Integration - Supports integrating multiple large model providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.)
Streaming Responses - Based on SSE, real-time streaming message transmission, instantly showing AI replies
Context Understanding - Supports historical conversation records, enabling AI to provide coherent conversation experiences based on context

knowledgeManagement.title: Knowledge Base Management (RAG)
features: Document Knowledge Base - Supports uploading documents to build knowledge bases, enhancing AI answer accuracy
QA Knowledge Base - Q&A pairs form of knowledge management, quickly expanding AI knowledge
Website Knowledge Base - Grabs website content to build knowledge bases, keeping information synchronized
Intelligent Retrieval - Semantic search based on vectors, accurately matching answers

mcpToolIntegration.title: MCP Tool Integration
features: Tool Store - Rich MCP tool library, enable as needed
Custom Tools - Support project-level tool configuration and management
OpenAPI Schema - Automatically parse Schema to generate interactive forms

multiChannelAccess.title: Multi-Channel Access
features: Web Widget - Embeddable chat widget for websites
WeChat Integration - Supports public account, mini program access
Unified Management - Manage all access channels in one backend

realTimeCommunication.title: Real-Time Communication
features: 悟空 IM Integration - Deep integration with悟空 IM, providing stable and reliable instant messaging capabilities
WebSocket Long Connection - Efficient bidirectional communication, supporting immediate message push
Message Status Synchronization - Read/unread status, message delivery confirmation
Multimedia Support - Supports text, images, files, etc. multiple message types

humanAgentCollaboration.title: Human-Agent Collaboration
features: Intelligent Transfer - Seamlessly transfers to human agents when necessary
Visitor Management - Collects visitor information, assigns sessions, and maintains session history
Agent Workspace - Unified interface for human agents to handle customer service tasks

uiWidgetSystem.title: UI Widget System
features: Structured Presentation - Presents order, product, logistics information in a beautiful card format
Rich Components - Includes order card, logistics tracking, product display, price comparison, etc.
Interaction Protocol - Standardized Action URI protocol, supports link jump, message sending, content copying

GetStarted.subheading: Quickly start using Tgo to build your AI customer service application.
